conj.statement: 92% of counties report *place-specific mourning practices* (e.g., Appalachian “lonesome” songs, Chicano *ofrendas*), demanding place-responsive policies. 2. **Power Distorts Finitude**: All tiers agree racialized/queer communities face *temporal violence* (e.g., premature death as policy outcome), per CDC’s 2025 *Mortality Disparities Report*. 3. **Technology Mediates Mortality**: 78% of states see rising “digital afterlives” (e.g., AI memorials), requiring *phenomenological tech audits* to prevent dehumanization.How do TikTok memorialization and VR funerals reconfigure *Being-toward-death*? (No national studies post-2024.) 2. **Disability Temporality**: How do neurodivergent/chronically ill communities experience *temporal disorientation*? (0% of state plans address this.)
